facts.expectation: Method metadata preserves lab, method basis EPA 533 modified, SCIEX 6500+ QTRAP, column, injection, mobile phases, and study dates.
Manifest preserves sample IDs, matrix, collected/received times, pH, chlorine, volume, and condition for all eight rows.
All four equations are preserved: R, C_sample, LOD, and U95 with k=2.
Calibration table preserves all 12 analytes with IS, quantifier, qualifier, RT, m, b, R2, range, LOD, and LOQ.
Calibration curve data for PFOA, PFOS, and HFPO-DA are preserved with levels and response values.
Residual table preserves PFOA 7.8, PFOS 10.6, HFPO-DA 6.1, zero failing points, and reviewer notes.
Table S4 is preserved as one logical continuation table across pages 4 and 5, with repeated headers not treated as data.
All Table S4 recovery/RSD/N/status values for PFBA through HFPO-DA are preserved.
Matrix spike table preserves native/spike/MS/MSD/RPD/flag values, including PFOS J-native below 2x LOQ and 6:2 FTS low bias monitored.
Sequence 18 DW-240409-04 is Reinject due to InternalStd_OK No; Seq 19 DW-240409-04-RI is Accepted and controls final results.
Review trail preserves M. Iyer 2024-04-19 14:05, L. Chen 2024-04-22 09:40, and R. Patel 2024-04-22 16:10.
All six chromatogram panels preserve panel labels, sample/channel, RT/area/concentration or IS recovery facts.
Retention windows preserve PFOA 4.41 +/-0.08, PFHxS 4.63 +/-0.08, 6:2 FTS 5.19 +/-0.10, PFOS 5.64 +/-0.10.
Final results table preserves sample/analyte/result/qualifier/U95/reference rows, including DW-240409-04 references Seq 19.
Uncertainty budget preserves all component percentages and expanded U k=2 values 15.4, 22.8, and 13.8.
Qualifier meanings are preserved: U not detected, J estimated, RI reinjection, MS matrix spike, MSD matrix spike duplicate.
